description: Fix GraphQL injection in compare_asset_prices where UUID and quoteCurrency values are string-interpolated into the query.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/coinbase && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Use GraphQL variables instead of string interpolation in compare_asset_prices
userStories.description: The buildQuery function interpolates uuid and quoteCurrency values directly into the GraphQL query string with double quotes. Use GraphQL variables instead.
acceptanceCriteria: UUID values are passed as GraphQL variables, not interpolated into the query string
quoteCurrency is passed as a GraphQL variable
The query still uses aliased fields (a0, a1, ...) for batching
